Location: 42:30 - 45:24
Node: Context.Service<JsonPlaceholder, {\n  readonly getTodo: (id: number) => Effect.Effect<Todo, JsonPlaceholderError>\n  readonly getUser: (id: number) => Effect.Effect<User, JsonPlaceholderError>\n}>()("JsonPlaceholder")
Node Kind: KindCallExpression

Subject: "JsonPlaceholder"
Subject Type: "JsonPlaceholder"

  [0] kind: call

      args: (constant)

=== Piping Flow ===
Location: 47:28 - 107:76
Node: Layer.effect(JsonPlaceholder)(\n  Effect.gen(function* () {\n    const config = yield* ApiConfig\n    const client = (yield* HttpClient.HttpClient).pipe(\n      HttpClient.mapRequest(\n        flow(\n          HttpClientRequest.prependUrl(config.baseUrl),\n          HttpClientRequest.acceptJson\n        )\n      ),\n      HttpClient.filterStatusOk\n    )\n\n    return {\n      getTodo: (id: number) => {\n        const path = `/todos/${id}`\n        const url = new URL(path, config.baseUrl).toString()\n\n        return client.get(path).pipe(\n          Effect.flatMap(HttpClientResponse.schemaBodyJson(Todo)),\n          Effect.mapError((cause) => {\n            if (cause._tag === "HttpClientError") {\n              if (cause.reason._tag === "StatusCodeError") {\n                return new InvalidStatusError({\n                  url,\n                  status: cause.reason.response.status\n                })\n              }\n\n              return new RequestError({ url, cause })\n            }\n\n            return new DecodeError({ url, cause })\n          })\n        )\n      },\n      getUser: (id: number) => {\n        const path = `/users/${id}`\n        const url = new URL(path, config.baseUrl).toString()\n\n        return client.get(path).pipe(\n          Effect.flatMap(HttpClientResponse.schemaBodyJson(User)),\n          Effect.mapError((cause) => {\n            if (cause._tag === "HttpClientError") {\n              if (cause.reason._tag === "StatusCodeError") {\n                return new InvalidStatusError({\n                  url,\n                  status: cause.reason.response.status\n                })\n              }\n\n              return new RequestError({ url, cause })\n            }\n\n            return new DecodeError({ url, cause })\n          })\n        )\n      }\n    }\n  })\n).pipe(Layer.provide(Layer.mergeAll(ApiConfigLive, FetchHttpClient.layer)))
Node Kind: KindCallExpression

Subject: function* () {\n    const config = yield* ApiConfig\n    const client = (yield* HttpClient.HttpClient).pipe(\n      HttpClient.mapRequest(\n        flow(\n          HttpClientRequest.prependUrl(config.baseUrl),\n          HttpClientRequest.acceptJson\n        )\n      ),\n      HttpClient.filterStatusOk\n    )\n\n    return {\n      getTodo: (id: number) => {\n        const path = `/todos/${id}`\n        const url = new URL(path, config.baseUrl).toString()\n\n        return client.get(path).pipe(\n          Effect.flatMap(HttpClientResponse.schemaBodyJson(Todo)),\n          Effect.mapError((cause) => {\n            if (cause._tag === "HttpClientError") {\n              if (cause.reason._tag === "StatusCodeError") {\n                return new InvalidStatusError({\n                  url,\n                  status: cause.reason.response.status\n                })\n              }\n\n              return new RequestError({ url, cause })\n            }\n\n            return new DecodeError({ url, cause })\n          })\n        )\n      },\n      getUser: (id: number) => {\n        const path = `/users/${id}`\n        const url = new URL(path, config.baseUrl).toString()\n\n        return client.get(path).pipe(\n          Effect.flatMap(HttpClientResponse.schemaBodyJson(User)),\n          Effect.mapError((cause) => {\n            if (cause._tag === "HttpClientError") {\n              if (cause.reason._tag === "StatusCodeError") {\n                return new InvalidStatusError({\n                  url,\n                  status: cause.reason.response.status\n                })\n              }\n\n              return new RequestError({ url, cause })\n            }\n\n            return new DecodeError({ url, cause })\n          })\n        )\n      }\n    }\n  }
Subject Type: () => Generator<Effect<HttpClient, never, HttpClient> | Effect<{ readonly baseUrl: string; }, never, ApiConfig>, { getTodo: (id: number) => Effect<Todo, DecodeError | InvalidStatusError | RequestError, never>; getUser: (id: number) => Effect<User, DecodeError | InvalidStatusError | RequestError, never>; }, any>

Transformations (3):

      callee: Effect.gen
      args: (constant)

      callee: Layer.provide
      args: [Layer.mergeAll(ApiConfigLive, FetchHttpClient.layer)]
      outType: Layer<JsonPlaceholder, never, never>

=== Piping Flow ===
Location: 109:16 - 126:2
Node: Effect.gen(function* () {\n  const api = yield* JsonPlaceholder\n  const [todo, user] = yield* Effect.all([api.getTodo(1), api.getUser(1)])\n\n  yield* Effect.log(`Todo #${todo.id}: ${todo.title}`)\n  yield* Effect.log(`Assigned to: ${user.name} <${user.email}>`)\n  yield* Effect.log(`Completed: ${todo.completed}`)\n}).pipe(\n  Effect.provide(JsonPlaceholderLive),\n  Effect.catchTags({\n    RequestError: (error) =>\n      Effect.log(`Request failed for ${error.url}: ${String(error.cause)}`),\n    InvalidStatusError: (error) =>\n      Effect.log(`Request to ${error.url} returned status ${error.status}`),\n    DecodeError: (error) =>\n      Effect.log(`Could not decode JSON from ${error.url}: ${String(error.cause)}`)\n  })\n)
Node Kind: KindCallExpression

Subject: function* () {\n  const api = yield* JsonPlaceholder\n  const [todo, user] = yield* Effect.all([api.getTodo(1), api.getUser(1)])\n\n  yield* Effect.log(`Todo #${todo.id}: ${todo.title}`)\n  yield* Effect.log(`Assigned to: ${user.name} <${user.email}>`)\n  yield* Effect.log(`Completed: ${todo.completed}`)\n}
Subject Type: () => Generator<Effect<void, never, never> | Effect<{ readonly getTodo: (id: number) => Effect<Todo, JsonPlaceholderError, never>; readonly getUser: (id: number) => Effect<User, JsonPlaceholderError, never>; }, never, JsonPlaceholder> | Effect<[Todo, User], JsonPlaceholderError, never>, void, any>

Transformations (3):
  [0] kind: call
      callee: Effect.gen
      args: (constant)
      outType: Effect<void, JsonPlaceholderError, JsonPlaceholder>
  [1] kind: pipeable
      callee: Effect.provide
      args: [JsonPlaceholderLive]
      outType: Effect<void, JsonPlaceholderError, never>
  [2] kind: pipeable
      callee: Effect.catchTags
      args: [{\n    RequestError: (error) =>\n      Effect.log(`Request failed for ${error.url}: ${String(error.cause)}`),\n    InvalidStatusError: (error) =>\n      Effect.log(`Request to ${error.url} returned status ${error.status}`),\n    DecodeError: (error) =>\n      Effect.log(`Could not decode JSON from ${error.url}: ${String(error.cause)}`)\n  }]
      outType: Effect<void, never, never>
